episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 380: Lord of the Rings (LTR) Set Review
episode.description: James and Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and wrap up our Lord of the Rings set review for Modern and EDH.
